info.title: CurrencyCore API
info.description: Edge-native currency exchange, PPP, and FX analytics API. Authenticate with your API key as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

get.description: Convert an amount between currencies, optionally PPP-adjusted.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Source currency (ISO 4217), e.g. USD. For PPP (ppp=true) pair it with a country as CUR:COUNTRY, e.g. USD:USA.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: One or more target currencies, comma-separated, e.g. EUR,INR (max 25). For PPP use CUR:COUNTRY pairs, e.g. EUR:DEU,INR:IND.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount to convert. Optional, defaults to 1 (so each result equals the rate).

parameters.name: ppp
parameters.description: When true, apply a PPP adjustment. Every currency must then carry a country code.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Rate date in YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Must not be in the future. Defaults to latest.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: The full exchange-rate snapshot for a date (USD base).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to the latest available date.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: The same snapshot re-expressed against any base currency.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Base currency (3-letter ISO 4217), e.g. EUR.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults to the latest available date.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: A single currency's daily rate time series over a date range. Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: The currency whose history to fetch (3-letter ISO 4217), e.g. INR. One currency per call.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to 7 days before `to`.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to today; a future date clamps to today.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Base currency the rates are expressed against (3-letter ISO 4217). Defaults to USD.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Aggregation: daily (default), weekly, monthly, or yearly. Coarser intervals average the daily rates per bucket (weekly key = the week's Monday, monthly = YYYY-MM, yearly = YYYY).

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: Trends, comparisons & 'movers': % change, strength, and min/max/avg over a window. Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Currency everything is measured against (3-letter ISO 4217). Defaults to USD.

parameters.name: currencies
parameters.description: Comma-separated currencies to compare, e.g. GBP,EUR,AED. OMIT to rank ALL currencies vs base ('movers' mode).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to 20 years (2 decades) before `to`. See `period` for a shorthand.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to today; a future date clamps to today.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Relative window shorthand for `from`: e.g. 10y, 6m, 30d, ytd, max. Ignored if `from` is given.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Movers ranking: strengthened (default) or weakened.

parameters.name: assetClass
parameters.description: Movers universe: fiat (default, the liquid tradeable currencies), metals (XAU/XAG/XPT/XPD), or all (every currency incl. illiquid/frontier). fiat excludes metals/synthetics + illiquid frontier codes; redenomination artifacts are always dropped.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Movers: how many top results to return (default 10, max 200).

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Attach a trend series per named currency: weekly, monthly, or yearly (compare mode only).

parameters.name: stats
parameters.description: Include min/max/avg over the window per currency. Defaults to true; pass false to skip.

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: PPP over time: how a country's purchasing-power-parity factor changed, comparing countries, or 'movers'. Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes to compare, e.g. IND,DEU,USA. OMIT to rank ALL countries by PPP-factor change ('movers' mode).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start YEAR (e.g. 2015). Defaults to 10 years before `to`. See `period` for a shorthand.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end YEAR (e.g. 2024). Defaults to the current year.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Relative window shorthand for `from`: e.g. 10y, 20y, max. Ignored if `from` is given.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Movers ranking: increased (PPP factor rose most, default) or decreased.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Movers: how many top results to return (default 10, max 200).

parameters.name: stats
parameters.description: Include min/max/avg of the PPP factor over the window per country. Defaults to true; pass false to skip.

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: Annualized volatility of a currency vs a base, or a stability ranking of the liquid currencies. Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency to measure (3-letter ISO 4217), or a comma-separated list to compare. OMIT to RANK the liquid-currency set by stability.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Base currency to measure against (3-letter ISO 4217). Defaults to USD.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to 365 days before `to`.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to today; a future date clamps to today.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Ranking direction: stable (least volatile first, default) or volatile.

parameters.name: universe
parameters.description: Ranking universe: liquid (default, broad set) or majors (USD/EUR/GBP/JPY/CHF/CAD/AUD/NZD). Use majors for 'most volatile major pair'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Ranking: how many to return (default 10, max 50).

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: Correlation of each currency's daily returns with a base currency's, over a window. Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Reference currency to correlate against (3-letter ISO 4217). Defaults to USD (a non-USD base is more meaningful).

parameters.name: currencies
parameters.description: Comma-separated currencies to correlate with `base`, e.g. GBP,CHF,SEK.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to 365 days before `to`.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to today.

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: Maximum peak-to-trough decline vs a base (with peak/trough/recovery), or a drawdown ranking. Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency to measure (3-letter ISO 4217), or a comma-separated list. OMIT to RANK the liquid set by drawdown.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Base currency to measure against (3-letter ISO 4217). Defaults to USD.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to 365 days before `to`.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Ranking direction: deepest (largest decline first, default) or recovery (fastest recovery first).

parameters.name: universe
parameters.description: Ranking universe: liquid (default) or majors.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Ranking: how many to return (default 10, max 50).

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: Ranks currencies by a composite safe-haven score (low volatility + shallow drawdown + 2008-crisis resilience). Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: currencies
parameters.description: Comma-separated currencies to score, e.g. CHF,JPY. OMIT to rank the safe-haven pool (includes gold).

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Base currency to measure against (3-letter ISO 4217). Defaults to USD.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to 2007-01-01 (spans the 2008 crisis + COVID).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: How many to return (default 10, max 50).

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: Ranks currencies by how strongly they revert to their mean (crossing frequency + reversion half-life). Growth plan or higher.

parameters.name: currencies
parameters.description: Comma-separated currencies to score, e.g. EUR,GBP. OMIT to rank the liquid set.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: Base currency to measure against (3-letter ISO 4217). Defaults to USD.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Window start YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to ~2 years before `to`.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Window end YYYY-MM-DD (UTC). Defaults to today.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: How many to return (default 10, max 50).

403.description: Requires the growth plan or higher.

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.

get.description: The supported countries and their official currencies. Public, no key needed.

The full list of supported ISO 4217 currencies. Use it to resolve a name or symbol to its code, or to check whether a currency is supported (so a missing one fails clearly, not silently). Public, no key needed.
Ask a natural-language currency question; the model answers using live rates.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A natural-language question, e.g. "Convert 50 euro to indian rupees" or "What's the USD to EUR rate today?".

429.description: Rate limit or monthly quota exceeded.
